ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter your AI context prompt here...
ast.target: 在此输入你的 AI 上下文提示...

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Your Anthropic API key for using Claude AI features.
ast.target: 用于使用 Claude AI 功能的 Anthropic API 密钥。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Your OpenAI API key for using ChatGPT AI features.
ast.target: 用于使用 ChatGPT AI 功能的 OpenAI API 密钥。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 自定义（用户定义的节拍结构）

ast.target: 访问工作区布局时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Settings] Failed to load scenes for discontinuity threshold:
ast.target: [Settings] 加载断续阈值的场景失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to refresh release notes from GitHub:
ast.target: 从 GitHub 刷新发行说明失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error running manuscript order beat update:
ast.target: 运行稿件顺序节拍更新时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 选择一个简短且唯一的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a saved layout (acts, subplots, assignments, metadata).
ast.target: 选择已保存的布局（幕、子情节、分配、元数据）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the root folder containing your manuscript scene files.
ast.target: 指定包含手稿场景文件的根文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the source folder name as the title of your work. When off, displays "Work in Progress" instead.
ast.target: 将源文件夹名称显示为作品标题。关闭时改为显示“Work in Progress”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a target date for project completion (YYYY-MM-DD). This will be shown on the timeline.
ast.target: 设置项目完成目标日期（YYYY-MM-DD）。这将在时间轴上显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Intercept clicks on scenes with Publish Stage = Zero and Status = Complete to capture Pending Edits without opening the scene.
ast.target: 拦截对 Publish Stage = Zero 且 Status = Complete 的场景点击，以便在不打开场景的情况下捕获 Pending Edits。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Map your custom frontmatter keys to Radial Timeline keys. Useful for pre-existing vaults.
ast.target: 将自定义 frontmatter 键映射到 Radial Timeline 键。对已有库很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applies to Narrative, Subplot, and Gossamer modes. Scene and Beats YAML. (Minimum 3)
ast.target: 适用于 Narrative、Subplot 和 Gossamer 模式。Scene 和 Beats YAML。（最少 3）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off, acts show numbers only.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, scene hover metadata include the AI pulse for the previous and next scenes. Turn off to display only the current scene for a more compact view.
ast.target: 启用后，场景悬停元数据包含前后场景的 AI pulse。关闭则仅显示当前场景以获得更紧凑的视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick preferred model for advanced writing analysis. Models marked "Latest" auto-update to the newest version.
ast.target: 选择用于高级写作分析的首选模型。标记为“Latest”的模型会自动更新到最新版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The API endpoint. For Ollama, use "http://localhost:11434/v1". For LM Studio, use "http://localhost:1234/v1".
ast.target: API 端点。Ollama 使用“http://localhost:11434/v1”。LM Studio 使用“http://localhost:1234/v1”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The exact model name your server expects (e.g., "llama3", "mistral-7b", "local-model").
ast.target: 服务器所期望的准确模型名称（例如“llama3”“mistral-7b”“local-model”）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Additional instructions added to the start of the prompt. Useful for fine-tuning local model behavior.
ast.target: 添加到提示开头的附加指令。用于微调本地模型行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default is enabled. Local LLM triplet pulse analysis skips writing to the scene note and saves the results in the RAW AI log report instead. Recommended for local models.
ast.target: 默认启用。本地 LLM 三元组脉冲分析会跳过写入场景笔记，改为将结果保存到 RAW AI 日志报告中。推荐用于本地模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required by some servers. For local tools like Ollama, this is usually ignored.
ast.target: 某些服务器需要。对 Ollama 等本地工具通常会忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, create a new note in the "AI" folder for each AI API request/response.
ast.target: 启用后，为每次 AI API 请求/响应在“AI”文件夹中创建一条新笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a default mode to apply. Scene level POV will override this global setting.
ast.target: 选择要应用的默认模式。场景级 POV 会覆盖此全局设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Values you can use for YAML field `POV:` first, second, third, omni, objective, or a number such as two, four, count, or all to designate more than one character is carrying the scene POV. If two, for example, then the first two characters in `Character:` YAML list will get a POV mark.
ast.target: YAML 字段 `POV:` 可使用的值：first、second、third、omni、objective，或使用诸如 two、four、count、all 等数字来表示有多于一个角色承担场景 POV。例如使用 two 时，`Character:` YAML 列表中的前两个角色会获得 POV 标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep Earth as the planning source, use the profile label to match your planet or setting calendar. Set epoch offset to align Year 1 to a story milestone, and combine with the backdrop notes for complete context.
ast.target: 以地球作为规划来源，使用配置文件标签匹配你的行星或设定日历。设置纪元偏移以将第 1 年对齐到故事里程碑，并与背景备注结合以获得完整上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Determines how the year is divided. Provide names to set the month count (e.g. 4 names = 4 months). Leave blank for 12 numbered months.
ast.target: 可选。决定一年如何划分。提供名称以设置月数（例如 4 个名称 = 4 个月）。留空则为 12 个编号月份。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Sets weekday labels; leave blank for numbered weekdays.
ast.target: 可选。设置星期标签；留空则为编号星期。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 用于场景分析的 AI 大语言模型

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用 AI 大语言模型功能

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show previous and next scene analysis
ast.target: 显示前一与后一场景分析

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 本地大语言模型基础 URL

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Bypass scene hover metadata yaml writes
ast.target: 跳过场景悬停元数据 YAML 写入

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Log AI interactions to file including sent and received payloads
ast.target: 将 AI 交互记录到文件，包括发送和接收的负载

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入搜索词（至少 3 个字母）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 例如：惊悚 / 三幕式平衡

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入你的 Anthropic API 密钥

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入你的 API 密钥

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 例如：保持严格的 JSON 格式...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Enter momentum scores (0-100) for each beat. Previous scores will be saved as history.
ast.target: 为每个节拍输入动量分数（0-100）。之前的分数将保存为历史记录。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Zero draft mode is enabled. This scene has Publish Stage = Zero and Status = Complete. You can turn this off in Settings → Zero draft mode.
ast.target: 零草稿模式已启用。此场景的发布阶段 = Zero，状态 = Complete。你可以在 设置 → 零草稿模式 中关闭此项。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Large batch processing may take significant time and API costs.
ast.target: 大批量处理可能需要较长时间并产生 API 成本。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 初始化中…正在准备第一个场景（0%）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Triplets animate as the AI advances - starts, endings, and missing scenes handled automatically.
ast.target: 随着 AI 推进，三连点会动画显示——开头、结尾和缺失场景会自动处理。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Are you sure you want to proceed?

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Select a model to see guidance on when to use it.
ast.target: 选择一个模型以查看其适用场景的指导。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Release notes are not available in this build.
ast.target: 此版本中不提供发行说明。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Copy beat names in AI-ready format
ast.target: 以 AI 可用格式复制节拍名称

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 重置为自动计算的阈值

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Detect installed models and auto-fill this field
ast.target: 检测已安装的模型并自动填充此字段

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to build synopsis for scene:

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to fetch release notes bundle:

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No beats available to copy. Add Beat notes with the selected Beat Model first.
ast.target: 没有可复制的节拍。请先使用所选节拍模型添加节拍注释。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No scores found in clipboard. Expected format: "1: 15, 2: 25" or "Beat Name: 42"
ast.target: 剪贴板中未找到分数。期望格式：“1: 15, 2: 25”或“Beat Name: 42”

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to save scores. Check console for details.
ast.target: 保存分数失败。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Gossamer scores found to delete.
ast.target: 未找到可删除的 Gossamer 分数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to delete all scores. Check console for details.
ast.target: 删除所有分数失败。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No story beats found. Create notes with frontmatter "Class: Beat" (or "Class: Plot" deprecated).
ast.target: 未找到故事节拍。请创建带有 frontmatter“Class: Beat”的笔记（或已弃用的“Class: Plot”）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot enter Gossamer mode: No story beats found. Create notes with frontmatter "Class: Beat" (or "Class: Plot" for backward compatibility).
ast.target: 无法进入 Gossamer 模式：未找到故事节拍。请创建带有 frontmatter“Class: Beat”的笔记（或用于向后兼容的“Class: Plot”）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Gossamer scores found. Showing ideal ranges and spokes. Add scores using "Gossamer enter momentum scores" command.
ast.target: 未找到 Gossamer 分数。显示理想范围和辐条。使用“Gossamer enter momentum scores”命令添加分数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No story beats found. Create notes with frontmatter "Class: Beat".
ast.target: 未找到故事节拍。请创建带有 frontmatter“Class: Beat”的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No scenes found in source path.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Processing continues in background. Use command palette to reopen progress window.
ast.target: 处理在后台继续进行。使用命令面板重新打开进度窗口。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No scenes to process with the selected mode.
ast.target: 所选模式下没有可处理的场景。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在处理副情节：获取场景数据...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No valid scenes found in the specified source path.
ast.target: 在指定源路径中未找到有效场景。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到包含副情节的场景。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error processing subplots. Check console for details.
ast.target: 处理副情节时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: Failed to parse dummy API response data.
ast.target: 错误：无法解析虚拟 API 响应数据。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error during YAML update test. Check console.
ast.target: YAML 更新测试时出错。请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在从所有场景中清除节拍...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error purging beats. Check console for details.
ast.target: 清除节拍时出错。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在重新打开活动处理会话...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter at least 3 letters to search
ast.target: 请输入至少 3 个字母进行搜索

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot enter Gossamer mode: No story beats found. Create notes with frontmatter "Class: Beat".
ast.target: 无法进入 Gossamer 模式：未找到故事节拍。请创建带有 frontmatter "Class: Beat" 的笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Layout reset to defaults with auto distribution.
ast.target: 布局已重置为默认并自动分配。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Target date must be in the future.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid gap threshold format. Examples: "4 days", "1 week", "2 months"
ast.target: 间隔阈值格式无效。示例：“4 days”、“1 week”、“2 months”

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Discontinuity threshold reset to auto-calculated value
ast.target: 不连续阈值已重置为自动计算的值

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No custom beats defined. Add beats in the list above.
ast.target: 未定义自定义节拍。请在上方列表中添加节拍。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Folder path cannot contain the characters < > : " | ? *
ast.target: 文件夹路径不能包含字符 < > : " | ? *

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This does not look like an OpenAI secret key. Keys start with "sk-".
ast.target: 这不像是 OpenAI 的密钥。密钥以 "sk-" 开头。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select "Local / OpenAI Compatible" above to detect models.
ast.target: 在上方选择“Local / OpenAI Compatible”以检测模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set the Local LLM Base URL first.
ast.target: 请先设置本地 LLM Base URL。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No models reported by the local server.
ast.target: 本地服务器未报告任何模型。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to open Gossamer score entry.
ast.target: 打开 Gossamer 评分条目失败。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Add a planetary profile in Settings first.
ast.target: 请先在设置中添加行星档案。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Warning: Duplicate title. Please wait 1 minute then try again.
ast.target: 警告：标题重复。请等待 1 分钟后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Local AI provider requires Base URL and Model ID.
ast.target: 本地 AI 提供商需要 Base URL 和 Model ID。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 在 Wiki 中了解更多

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Specify the root folder containing your manuscript scene files.
ast.target: 指定包含手稿场景文件的根文件夹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display the source folder name as the title of your work. When off, displays "Work in Progress" instead.
ast.target: 将源文件夹名称显示为作品标题。关闭时则显示“Work in Progress”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose a default mode to apply. Scene level POV will override this global setting.
ast.target: 选择要应用的默认模式。场景级 POV 将覆盖此全局设置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Values you can use for `POV:` first, second, third, omni, objective, or a number such as two, four, count, or all to designate more than one character is carrying the scene POV. If two, for example, then the first two characters in `Character:` YAML list will get a POV mark for scene synopsis.
ast.target: 可用于 `POV:` 的值：first, second, third, omni, objective，或数字如 two, four, count, 或 all，用于表示多个角色承载场景 POV。例如 two，则 `Character:` YAML 列表中的前两位角色会在场景摘要中标记 POV。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Folder where AI logs and generated files (manuscripts, local LLM reports) are saved. Uses your vault folder structure.
ast.target: 保存 AI 日志和生成文件（稿件、本地 LLM 报告）的文件夹。使用你的 vault 文件夹结构。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When hovering over a scene, automatically expand it if the title text is clipped. Disable this if you prefer to quickly slide through scenes and read titles from the synopsis instead.
ast.target: 悬停在场景上时，如果标题文本被裁剪则自动展开。若你更喜欢快速滑过场景并从摘要读取标题，请禁用此项。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose a curated font sizing profile for timeline text. Large is tuned for low-res or low-vision viewing; Normal works for standard and high-dpi layouts.
ast.target: 为时间线文本选择预设字号配置。Large 适合低分辨率或低视力观看；Normal 适用于标准和高 DPI 布局。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display a tick mark and label on the timeline for the estimated completion date. Tip: When you complete a scene, in addition to setting the Status to Complete, also set the Due date to the same day the scene was completed to improve the estimate.
ast.target: 在时间线上为预计完成日期显示刻度和标签。提示：完成场景时，除了将 Status 设为 Complete，还应将 Due date 设为场景完成当天以改进估算。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Delay before refreshing the timeline after YAML frontmatter changes. Increase if your vault is large and updates feel too frequent.
ast.target: YAML frontmatter 更改后刷新时间线的延迟。若 vault 很大且更新感觉过于频繁，可提高该值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Clear all saved subplot color dominance preferences for scenes that appear in multiple subplots. This resets to the default ordering (outermost to innermost rings based on subplot scene population).
ast.target: 清除出现在多个子情节中的场景所保存的子情节颜色主导偏好。这将重置为默认排序（根据子情节场景数量从最外环到最内环）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Under consideration. Sort scenes chronologically by When date instead of manuscript order for all modes.
ast.target: 仍在考虑中。所有模式下按 When 日期而非稿件顺序对场景进行时间顺序排序。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Turns on the converter modal, Chronologue Alt/Option tooltip, and synopsis line for the active profile.
ast.target: 为活动配置启用转换器模态窗口、Chronologue Alt/Option 工具提示和摘要行。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Pick which planet or setting profile is used for conversions.
ast.target: 选择用于转换的行星或设定配置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: 原稿シーンファイルを含むルートフォルダを指定します。
ast.target: 指定包含原稿场景文件的根文件夹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: ソースフォルダ名を作品のタイトルとして表示します。オフの場合、「進行中の作品」と表示されます。
ast.target: 将源文件夹名称显示为作品标题。关闭时显示“进行中的作品”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: オプション。適用するデフォルトモードを選択します。シーンレベルのPOVはこのグローバル設定を上書きします。
ast.target: 可选。选择要应用的默认模式。场景级 POV 会覆盖此全局设置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: AIログや生成ファイル（原稿、レポートなど）を保存するフォルダです。ボールト内のフォルダを指定してください。
ast.target: 保存 AI 日志和生成文件（原稿、报告等）的文件夹。请指定 vault 内的文件夹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: シーンにホバーしたとき、タイトルテキストがクリップされている場合は自動的に展開します。
ast.target: 悬停在场景上时，如果标题文本被裁剪则自动展开。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: タイムラインテキストのフォントサイズプロファイルを選択します。
ast.target: 选择时间线文本的字号配置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: コマンドパレットオプションとUIシーン分析の色とホバーシノプシスを表示します。
ast.target: 显示命令面板选项以及 UI 场景分析的颜色和悬停摘要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The first impression of your story. A snapshot of the protagonist's life before the journey begins. This 'before' picture sets up the world and establishes what will change by the end. Show the protagonist in their everyday life, revealing the flaw or gap that will be addressed.
ast.target: 故事的第一印象。旅程开始前主人公生活的快照。这张“之前”的图景建立世界观，并确立最终会改变的内容。展示主人公的日常生活，揭示将被解决的缺陷或缺口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A moment of reflection and wallowing in defeat. The protagonist processes the loss, questions everything, and confronts their deepest fears. This quiet, internal moment allows both character and audience to feel the full weight of All Is Lost before the final push begins.
ast.target: 反思并沉溺于失败的时刻。主人公消化失去的结果，质疑一切，直面最深的恐惧。这个安静的内心时刻让角色和观众在最终冲刺前充分感受“全盘皆失”的重量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hero's normal life before the adventure begins. Establish who they are, what they believe, their relationships, and their routine. Show what's lacking or incomplete in their life. This familiar world will be contrasted with the Special World they're about to enter.
ast.target: 冒险开始前英雄的正常生活。确立他们是谁、信念、关系与日常。展示生活中缺失或不完整之处。这个熟悉的世界将与即将进入的特殊世界形成对比。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hero leaves the Ordinary World and enters the Special World of the adventure. This is the point of no return where they commit fully to the journey. The rules change, stakes rise, and the hero must adapt to this new and unfamiliar environment.
ast.target: 英雄离开普通世界，进入冒险的特殊世界。这是不归点，他们完全承诺踏上旅程。规则改变，风险升高，英雄必须适应这个新的陌生环境。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Having survived the Ordeal, the hero claims their reward—knowledge, power, treasure, reconciliation, or love. They take possession of what they came for, though often it's different from what they originally sought. Success brings new understanding and confidence.
ast.target: 在渡过磨难后，英雄获得奖励——知识、力量、财富、和解或爱情。他们占有为之而来的东西，但往往与最初寻求的不同。成功带来新的理解与信心。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hero begins the journey home but faces consequences or pursuit from their actions in the Special World. New complications arise, and forces may try to prevent their return. The hero must choose to complete the journey and bring their reward back to the Ordinary World.
ast.target: 英雄开始回程，却要面对在特殊世界行动带来的后果或追击。新的复杂情况出现，力量可能阻止他们归来。英雄必须选择完成旅程，将奖励带回普通世界。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The climactic final test where the hero must use everything they've learned. This is a last purification or rebirth before returning home. The stakes are highest here—often involving life and death for more than just the hero. They must prove their transformation is complete.
ast.target: 终局性的最终考验，英雄必须运用所学的一切。这是回家前最后的净化或重生。这里的赌注最高——常涉及不止英雄的生死。他们必须证明自己的蜕变已完成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hero returns to the Ordinary World transformed and bearing something (knowledge, treasure, wisdom, or experience) that benefits their community. The journey is complete, the hero has grown, and life is better than before. The story comes full circle with meaningful change.
ast.target: 英雄带着转变回到平凡世界，并带回某种能惠及社区的东西（知识、宝藏、智慧或经验）。旅程圆满结束，英雄已成长，生活比以前更好。故事以有意义的变化回到原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Escalating obstacles that worsen the situation. Each complication raises stakes and limits options; no repetition—pressure increases.
ast.target: 不断升级、使局势恶化的障碍。每个复杂情节都会提高风险并限制选择；不重复——压力加剧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Binary choice: best bad option vs worst bad option. Forces the protagonist to risk what they value most.
ast.target: 二选一：最不坏的选项 vs 最坏的选项。迫使主人公冒险赌上最珍视的东西。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Action taken to answer the Crisis question. Irreversible, value-charged decision.
ast.target: 为回答危机问题而采取的行动。不可逆、价值取向强烈的决定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Momentum analysis for each story beat
ast.target: 每个故事节拍的动量分析

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ideal momentum range for this beat
ast.target: 该节拍的理想动量范围

ast.name: description
ast.source: True if momentum score is within ideal range
ast.target: 若动量评分在理想范围内则为 True

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief justification for the score (one sentence)
ast.target: 评分的简要理由（一句话）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brief summary of overall momentum (max 30 words)
ast.target: 整体动量的简要总结（最多 30 个词）

ast.name: description
ast.source: View all scenes across all subplots in manuscript order with subplot coloring
ast.target: 按稿件顺序查看所有子情节的全部场景，并以子情节着色

ast.name: description

ast.target: 查看主线情节场景并按发布阶段着色，其他子情节显示在内圈

ast.name: description

ast.target: 带有节拍跟踪和历史数据的 Gossamer 评分分析叠加层

ast.name: description
ast.source: View scenes in chronological story order based on When field
ast.target: 根据 When 字段按故事时间顺序查看场景

ast.name: description
ast.target: 编辑评论（最多 10 个词）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use markdown-linked TOC for Obsidian-friendly navigation, or plain TOC for AI processing. All orderings support custom ranges with the draggable selector.
ast.target: 使用带 Markdown 链接的目录以便在 Obsidian 中导航，或使用纯目录供 AI 处理。所有排序都支持通过可拖拽选择器自定义范围。

ast.name: empty
ast.source: Add a profile to start configuring planetary time.
ast.target: 添加配置档案以开始设置行星时间。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Response exceeded maximum token limit. The output was truncated before completion. Try reducing the manuscript size or increasing maxOutputTokens.
ast.target: 响应超过最大 token 限制。输出在完成前被截断。请尝试减少稿件大小或提高 maxOutputTokens。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Response blocked due to recitation concerns.
ast.target: 由于复述风险，响应已被阻止。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will permanently delete ALL Gossamer scores (Gossamer1-30) and their justifications from ALL Beat notes.
ast.target: 这将永久删除所有 Beat 备注中的全部 Gossamer 分数（Gossamer1-30）及其理由。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 规范化 Gossamer 历史记录？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Are you sure you want to proceed?

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter Pending Edits below, or click Override to open the note directly.
ast.target: 在下方输入待处理的编辑，或点击“覆盖”直接打开备注。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Queue builds once eligible scenes are found...
ast.target: 找到符合条件的场景后将排队构建...

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search scenes by title, synopsis, characters, dates, and more.
ast.target: 按标题、概要、角色、日期等搜索场景。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Name this layout so you can reuse it later.
ast.target: 为此布局命名，以便稍后复用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Radial Timeline is a visual map of your story in a concise radial format, revealing structure, status, and meta. It works in four focused modes, each answering a different creative question.
ast.target: 径向时间轴以简洁的径向格式呈现你的故事视觉地图，揭示结构、状态和元信息。它有四种专注模式，每种都回答不同的创作问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Bug reporting & Get Help buttons in the bottom corners of the Radial Timeline window are always available. The Book Designer can help you begin by setting up a starter set of scenes.
ast.target: 径向时间轴窗口底部角落的“报告问题”和“获取帮助”按钮始终可用。图书设计器可以通过设置一组起始场景来帮助你开始。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It is strongly recommended for you to

ast.name: text

ast.target: 避免混用同步服务。如果在 macOS 上使用 iCloud 并同时使用另一个同步工具，请在

ast.name: text
ast.source: to the folder name to stop iCloud from syncing the vault.

ast.name: text

ast.name: text

ast.target: 每个节拍笔记将具有以下 YAML 结构：

ast.target: 确定要重置吗？此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Used for completed scenes, stage matrix, act labels and more.
ast.target: 用于已完成的场景、阶段矩阵、章节标签等。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 子剧情环颜色用于从外向内的第 1 到第 16 环。

ast.target: 定义在 AI 提示词和 Gossamer 评分前添加的上下文。

ast.source: Scroll to explore the rest of the updates

ast.target: 仅在此子情节中的场景将移至主剧情

ast.target: 选择一个子情节，仅为该情节线运行 pulse 更新。
